description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a flat roof, featuring a combination of white and gray exterior walls. The property includes a spacious fenced yard with green grass, a paved driveway leading to a detached garage, and a private swimming pool with lounge chairs. Palm trees are planted at the corners of the lot, adding a touch of tropical landscaping. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior living spaces to the outdoor areas. The house layout is open, with visible living, kitchen, and bathroom areas, and the main entrance is accentuated by a paved walkway and a simple, clean entryway.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, fenced yard, pool, detached garage, and palm landscaping. Features large windows, open layout, and a clean, minimalist entryway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the side, highlighting the pool area with lounge chairs, the grassy yard, and the detached garage in the background.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the rear, focusing on the pool, fenced yard, and the back of the main living area with visible windows and palm trees.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the house from the opposite side, emphasizing the garage, paved driveway, and the green yard with palm trees at the corners.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the front of the house, featuring the main entryway, paved walkway, and the detached garage with the pool and yard visible behind.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple, flush entryway with a paved walkway, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
